analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with an existing HTML structure, CSS styling, and JavaScript functionality. The current theme needs enhancement to better reflect the black hole topic with animated objects, slides, and a cohesive cosmic design. The CSS file should be updated to include dark, cosmic-themed animations and patterns, while the HTML and JavaScript should support interactive elements and smooth transitions.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the SVG data URLs for patterns are properly formatted and include Egyptian-themed color palettes and UI elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Update the JavaScript file to include improved mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions. Ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality for the new interactive elements.
